subcodes.first_line: O befitting servant of the Sacred Threshold! The grievous tidings of the passing of that cherished handmaiden of God reached the divine gathering [3.5s]... ...O Thou Kind Lord! This dearly cherished maidservant was attracted to Thee, and through reflection and discernment longed to attain Thy presence
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده زیبنده آستان مقدس خبر وحشت اثر فوت آن کنیز عزیز الهی بانجمن رحمانی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
